direct_answer: No. Porch & Party grazing-table starting pricing covers styling only. Food is not included by default, but food sourcing can be requested for an additional fee.
best_for: This page is for hosts and organizers who need to know whether the visible grazing-table price includes food before they submit a quote request.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
